title: Criticals PVP
description:
UHC, Sword, Axe texture pack for 1.21.11!
Best for PVP, if you want more information or more texture packs join the discord server in the links page.
body:
Best 1.21.11 axe / sword / UHC texture pack!

More packs coming soon!

What does it do?
It changes textures to:
- Diamond Sword
- Diamond Axe
- Netherite Sword
- Netherite Axe
- Shield texture
- Mace Texture

  This pack is **not** for survival mode and I dont recommend using it in survival.

  Hope you enjoy the pack
  (If you want more packs join the discord)
